feed.title: Extended Atom Feed with Edge Cases

entry.content: This entry has no title field, just content. Common in social media.

entry.title: Long Form Article
entry.content:

Second paragraph continues the discussion with more detailed analysis and examples to demonstrate the concepts being presented. The text continues at length to test the system's handling of substantial content. More content goes here to exceed word count requirements.

Third paragraph provides even more detail about the subject matter, discussing various aspects and nuances.

entry.title: Multi-Image Story
entry.content:
A story with multiple images embedded.

More text after images.
